name: Kingston FURY Beast DDR5 RGB 16GB 6800MHz Memory Module - White - PC5-55400 - CL34 - Single-rank - 1.40V - On-die ECC - 288-Pin DIMM - AMD EXPO (KF568C34BWEA-16)
